headline: Incyte (INCY) Positioned to Offset Patent Cliff Risks, Analysts Reaffirm Stock Ratings
summary: Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ:INCY) ranks among the most profitable biotech stocks to buy now. On April 15, H.C. Wainwright restated Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ:INCY)’s Buy rating and $135 price target. The firm stated that Incyte’s povorcitinib could be administered in the early stages of hidradenitis suppurativa, rather than as a post-biologic oral alternative. H.C. Wainwright mentioned a […]
